text:
a string of binary digits; each digit 
of the value indicates which types of drugs are offered through the limited gap benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: LIMITED_GAP_BENEFIT_TYPE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 7 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Binary character string, where each digit is a 1 or 0. For example if the value=000001 (1 in only the 1st 
digit), then the limited gap coverage applies to all drugs on the formulary. 

1 in 1st digit = All Formulary Drugs 
1 in 2nd digit = Generic 
1 in
